intended_use: SIS System is an application intended for use in the viewing, presentation and documentation of medical imaging, including different modules for image processing, image fusion, and intraoperative func
intended_use_full: SIS System is an application intended for use in the viewing, presentation and documentation of medical imaging, including different modules for image processing, image fusion, and intraoperative functional planning where the 3D output can be used with stereotactic image guided surgery or other devices for further processing and visualization. The device can be used in conjunction with other clinical methods as an aid in visualization of the subthalamic nuclei (STN) and globus pallidus externa and interna (GPe and GPi, respectively).
target_condition: Preparation for stereotactic image-guided surgery; visualization of basal ganglia structures for surgical planning and lead placement assessment
ground_truth: Ultra-high resolution 7T MR images used as ground truth for training deep learning models; ground truth orientation measurements used for lead detection validation (±30° tolerance)
other_metrics: For lead orientation detection: 91% accuracy (within ±30° of ground truth) when software trusted the detection; greater than 90% of orientations presented to user are accurate within ±30°
